reviews.review_description: I love the finger tracking in the new beta and it's very accurate but it struggles in low light but overall 10/10

I got the notice today, and like I downloaded it at the same time. The hand-tracking for me its not that ok, but its not a problem for me. The problem is that i try to join a server (right now i tried to join a server with 18 players) it shoes there is only one player in a room. And i had to create another account (vrchat account) just to login in, because the oculus option is not working. I know its a beta but there is a lot of things to work with.

reviews.review_title: Doesn't even let me sign in 💀
reviews.review_description: Tried creating a account and signing into multiple accounts

reviews.review_title: I like the game a lot
reviews.review_description: Why I like the game because it's very fun, it has its bad people, then good people funny people, it just has a lot of people who like to socialize sound down. It's a big world out there, and I hope whoever downloads this game has a lot of fun 😇🥲

reviews.review_title: It won’t let me back in please fix this
reviews.review_description: My account is not logging in I had friends you know that!

reviews.review_title: Won’t let me login into my account
reviews.review_description: When I first loaded up the game and tried to sign into my oculus account it kept saying couldn’t authenticate oculus account and when I tried to make a different account and just merge the two accounts it didn’t let me verify my email

reviews.review_title: It doesn’t let me sign in
reviews.review_description: I put in my email that I used and it said that it was incorrect. Then I tried creating a new account and it said that this email was already in use but it was a email that I never used on my oculus.😤
is this ganna be on pc i can't find it :(
The hand tracking is really good! But I wanna know the reason why, when I try to join my friends.. it doesn’t work and puts me in a private world by myself.
Can’t login at all but still overall I think it’s gonna be good

I like the quality of it but there is one problem I'm not able to join friends on my vrc account and I'd love to learn how to but over all every thing else is nice the hand tracking is accurate eventually they should put it on normal vrchat
I can't sign in
I cant log in. It always says could not log in - oculus couldn’t Authenticate that user. Does anyone know how to fix this?
Eh, it’s alright.  Add Avatar Search!

hella hella hella confusing I get lost at some stuff but it’s hella cool
Bro, this version of VRC is awesome bruh literally I've never knew that you can have 300 avis and more space in favourite worlds and friends group stuff
So good
Could not log in kept saying error

reviews.review_title: I really love the tracking! but…
reviews.review_description: I eventually got used to the tracking and it got smoother and smoother the more i played it and the problem i have isn’t to bad but every time i would join a world everyone’s avatar would NOT be visible and would show a gray diamond as if they were loading unless i select them and turn their avatar on despite having safety shield off and them having the same platform as me. I’m not sure if this is an issue i have in the settings but i’m extremely sure that i didn’t have this issue on regular vr chat…yes i did research but i couldn’t find any helpful information. Also there isn’t a gesture or anyway to open expressions and use tools which really isn’t a problem but it would be great if that gets added soon, overall i really enjoyed playing this beta version!
